critic_raw:
Verdict — lending model:

Equalized odds and AUROC are positive but incomplete. Three gaps prevent a safe-expansion conclusion: fairness evaluation is incomplete (approval rates by group absent), portfolio loss is unverified (outcome data exists to compute it), and group calibration/reason stability are missing (compliance requirement).

Verdict: empirical_test_agreed
adjudication_raw: Baseline run 3. All three must-find issues. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

empirical_test.measure: expected portfolio loss, approval rates by group, group calibration
empirical_test.success_criterion: all three meet standards from existing data
